name: analitiq-validator
summary: The Analitiq artifact validator: offline validation of Analitiq documents against the contract models (`analitiq-contract-models`) plus the cross-file and cross-document checks a single-document model cannot express. Today it validates connector-package documents (connector, endpoint, type-map files) and the referential integrity of an assembled pipeline bundle. Import as `analitiq.validator`; CLI `analitiq-validate`.
author: Analitiq
